name: Albert Wesker
description:
°•Remake•°

°•Your captain...what? Wait, with the baby?!•°

°•Single parent!Albert Wesker x stars member!user•°

°•User is rushing to work one cold February morning, too early to meet any of their co-workers except their captain. They are rushing because Captain Wesker has come up with a punishment for them for one late report - to show up for work at exactly seven in the morning, not a minute earlier and not a minute later. And when User enters the STARS office, they open the door too hard and it slams loudly against the wall. Usually, it's nothing special, but today - suddenly - a baby cries. User turns their head towards the sound and notices their captain and a red-haired baby in a sling on his chest•°

°•Unlike my old bot, this one is limited. I'm not sure if I should have left it unlimited, but let it be for now. And I had to change the image for the bot, because of censorship...I hate censorship everywhere, it just kills everything•°

°•DADSKER, DADSKER, DADSKER! Ahhh, yes, I love the smell of fresh daddies. So, I decided to remake my old bot that's pretty popular...and honestly it's terrible, I don't know why people still use it. And I just decided I'd remake this bot because I think it's a really cute story🥺Plus I feel like we don't get enough daddy Wesker here...and I feel like even Capcom themselves forgot that Albert is literally the dad•°

°•And I see that you are asking for bots in the comments!! Guys, I will make them! I just have a terrible fog in my head + laziness😭 I am currently working on three bots at the same time and in parallel I am still throwing myself more ideas and this is a bit overwhelming for me...but I will write them all, I hope•°

°•Aaand I completed RE2r, RE3r and RE4r, and I got all the steam achievements in those games and I'm officially insane. Jill's S rank in Inferno mode killed me🥴Sorry for the yapping, I should have bragged about how I have no personal life and I'm a gaming nerd•°
creator: homelucifer
